summary: Completed comprehensive testing of JoyTracker happiness tracking application with all new features. Fixed critical frontend dependency issue (react-markdown). Both backend API and frontend UI are working correctly with 95%+ success rate across all major features.

design_issues.issue: Admin menu item not visible in side menu for admin users

passed_tests: Main page with improved happiness speedometer display
Period selector with grid layout (5 buttons + 'Other period')
Analysis page with 3 tabs (State repetition, Habit trend, Happiness trend)
Strategy page with 2 tabs (Solutions with filters, Reflection)
Education section with video categories (empty state handled correctly)
Profile page with comprehensive form fields
All backend API endpoints (45/45 tests passed)
Happiness score calculation for all periods
Analysis endpoints (state repetition, habit trend, happiness trend)
Admin endpoints (stats, FAQ, content, categories, videos, feedback)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI fix needed: Admin panel menu item should be visible in side menu for admin users. All core functionality is working correctly.
